name: cvd-record respects an explicit remediation_status on a finding when it is a valid enum value
command: printf '%s' '[{"component":"x","severity":"high","fixed_in":"2.0","advisory_id":"A","source":"s","remediation_status":"in_progress"}]' > g.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cvd-record.sh" --findings g.json 2>e.txt; grep -q 'status=in_progress' e.txt && echo c23-explicit-status 1>&2
